channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Democrats Consider Military Veterans for 2028 Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: In the wake of escalating U.S. military operations against Iran under President Donald Trump, Democrats are debating whether their 2028 presidential nominee should be a military veteran. The Politico ...

item.title: Trump urges allies to reopen Strait of Hormuz amid rising Middle East tensions; UN calls for ceasefire in Lebanon
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have escalated as US President Donald Trump called for allied nations to deploy warships to the Strait of Hormuz following US strikes on Iran’s Kharg Island, a key oil expo...

item.title: Ollur Constituency Likely to See Tight Contest in Upcoming Kerala Assembly Elections
item.description: Ollur in Thrissur district is considered a bellwether constituency in Kerala politics, having consistently elected candidates from the front that ultimately formed the state government since 1982. The...

item.title: Philippine Agriculture Department restricts poultry imports from Indiana due to bird flu outbreak
item.description: The Department of Agriculture (DA) of the Philippines has imposed a ban on the importation of poultry products from Indiana, USA, after reports confirmed the presence of the highly pathogenic H5N1 avi...

item.title: Government Reports Steady Progress on Pangani Bridge and Tanga-Pangani Road Projects
item.description: PANGANI, Tanzania – The construction works for the 525-metre Pangani Bridge and the 50-kilometre Tanga–Pangani road are moving steadily, as part of the government's nationwide push to improve transpor...

item.title: CBN Sets New BVN and Instant Payment Rules to Improve Banking Security
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) don set new regulations wey go change how people dey use bank services for the country. Di major one be say only people wey don reach 18 years go fit register for Ban...

item.title: Two Injured Following Crane Truck Oil Spill in Navotas City
item.description: In Navotas City, an accident involving a crane truck led to an oil spill and left two individuals injured. The incident occurred on March 14, 2026, and authorities responded promptly to contain the si...

item.title: Aesthetic nurse uses personal experience with acne to guide and support others
item.description: Anna Cerezo reports on the inspiring journey of an aesthetic nurse who faced personal struggles with acne. Rather than allowing her condition to affect her confidence negatively, she transformed her e...

item.title: Dinner by Heston to close at Mandarin Oriental after long-standing challenges
item.description: Dinner by Heston, the two Michelin-starred restaurant at the Mandarin Oriental in Knightsbridge, London, is set to close in January 2027 after a 16-year run. While Heston Blumenthal cited the end of t...

item.title: Practical Ways to Keep Your Room Cool Without AC
item.description: If na hot weather dey make you struggle to sleep, you no need AC to survive. This article show correct ways to keep your room cool even if power supply no dey steady. First, make you open your window ...

item.title: CBSE Class 12 Hindi Exam Scheduled on 16th March 2026
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has announced that the Class 12 Hindi examinations for the academic year 2026 are scheduled to be held on March 16. Students preparing for the exams sho...

item.title: Comprehensive Guide to Kenya Institute of Mass Communication Courses and Fees
item.description: The Kenya Institute of Mass Communication (KIMC), established in 1961 as the Voice of Kenya Training School, is one of Kenya's top institutions for media and communication training. It offers a variet...

item.title: African origins of Psilocybe cubensis uncovered through new species discovery
item.description: Scientists from Southern Africa and the US have identified a previously unknown species of magic mushroom, Psilocybe ochraceocentrata, in the grasslands of South Africa and Zimbabwe, shedding light on...

item.title: Kairuki Green IVF Centre gives free IVF to three Tanzanian women on Women’s Day
item.description: Dar es Salaam recently witnessed a heartwarming initiative where three women were selected to receive free IVF treatment at Kairuki Green IVF Centre (KGIVF) in Bunju A Mianzini. The selection happened...

item.title: High Court Rules Presidential Commission on 2025 Election Unrest Lawful
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Tanzania’s High Court on Friday dismissed a petition challenging the legality of a presidential commission formed to look into violence that occurred during and after the October 29, 2...

item.title: Authorities prevent planned school shooting in Calabarzon
item.description: Police successfully prevented a planned mass shooting at a school in Calabarzon, which was scheduled to take place on February 16. The Philippine National Police Anti-Cybercrime Group (ACG) received i...

item.title: Met Police investigate death of 18-day-old baby in Westminster
item.description: The Metropolitan Police have launched a murder investigation after the tragic death of an 18-day-old baby in Westminster. Officers were called to a residential property on Horseferry Road at 07:30 GMT...

item.title: California National Parks Reach Record Visitor Numbers Amid Operational Challenges
item.description: California’s nine national parks recorded a historic 12 million visits in 2025, surpassing previous records despite a series of challenges including staff layoffs, a 43-day federal shutdown, and contr...

item.title: 20-Year-Old Dies as Truck Hits Scooter on Delhi's ITO Flyover; Two Others Injured
item.description: A tragic road accident occurred on the ITO flyover in central Delhi during the intervening night of March 11 and 12, 2026. Three young men, all in their early twenties, were riding a scooter when a tr...

item.title: Casting directors recognised with new Oscar category for 2026
item.description: For decades, casting directors have been the unsung heroes of the film industry, shaping the very fabric of movies by choosing the right actors for each role. Despite Martin Scorsese’s assertion that ...
